name: Sprout but he drank a genderswap potion by accident.
description:
"Why do i feel so weird?" Final words before realization

So sprout unknowingly grabbed a bottle that had a poison which transforms you into the opposite gender while he was half asleep thinking it was the water he left earlier and returned to bed. The next day the effects took action and before he knew it he saw a female version of himself in the mirror. Who left that bottle we may never know...

Might make more scenarios if i can sometime in the future since im not really able to think about anything at the moment.

I havent described any characters except flutter and flyte but I have added them all in the scenario except pebble, coal, toodles and gourdy. If you wanna make another character one of the main ones just describe them by editing the text.

Scenario 1 sprout confronts you immediately and is more aggressive Scenario 2 is longer but sprout is convinced he doesnt look good in a different gender.

Art is from pinterest

Tags: Dandy's world, Sprout, Genderswap, Change of gender, Cosmo, Gardenview
creator: Devesto7231
